description_long: This is a standard orange basketball with a pebbled, textured rubber surface and deep black seams forming a traditional eight-panel pattern. The ball displays realistic details such as subtle dimples for grip and visible scuff marks, stains, and what appears to be dried liquid splatter on several panels, suggesting frequent outdoor use. The coloration is a classic burnt orange with slightly darker and lighter patches, enhancing its worn, urban character. No visible brand logos or manufacturer markings are present on any side. The seams are thick, black, and slightly recessed, providing tactile feedback for handling. The inflation valve is not visible in any of the provided views.
description: A well-used orange basketball with a textured surface, black seams, and visible stains and scuff marks, lacking any brand logo.
description_view_0: This view shows the basketball's left side with prominent dark stains and liquid splatter across the upper left panels.
description_view_1: This view displays a relatively clean surface with minimal visible markings, highlighting the ball's pebbled texture and seam pattern.
description_view_2: This view reveals the front panels with some faint scuff marks and a clear view of the seam arrangement.
description_view_3: This view features the most extensive stains and dried liquid splatter, concentrated on the upper right panels.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel pattern with wide, black, recessed seams forming curved sections typical of regulation basketballs.
attribute_visible_wear_or_graffiti: Visible stains, dried liquid splatter, and scuff marks on multiple panels, especially prominent in views 0 and 3.
